task: Block 26 — Partition Hot Tables: audit_log partitioned by month, maintenance cron, archival function
prior_state: NET-NEW — no partitioning existed on main
details: Migration 202606080940_block26_partition_hot_tables.sql: creates audit_log_partitioned (PARTITION BY RANGE created_at) with monthly partitions covering 2024-01 through 2027-12
Shadow table swap pattern: creates new partitioned table, copies data, original kept as fallback
create_audit_log_partition_for_month() function for dynamic partition creation
archive_audit_log_old_partitions() function for 7-year IRS retention review
partition_maintenance_log table tracks all partition operations
scripts/partition-maintenance.mjs: monthly cron creates next 2 months of partitions
EXPLAIN hint documented for verifying partition pruning
